path: PNGS/Aqa ﷺ asks nothing except for the love of his family.png
text: 4223 b R ® 2@ - oo o MoT L 2z o Basee | iite = e <F 2B o en o se o Tasos sgs sucd o oo o2 (55 225 GAE o il o 5550 ) 2T Wl KTV ol (L2 1A S 00 460 S50 el s St wAt 2t 7T (o) 555 558 413, It is that of which Allah gives good tidings to His servants who believe and do righteous deeds. Say, [0 Muhammad], I do not ask you for it [i.e., this ‘message] any payment [but] only good will through [i.e., due to] kinship." And whoever commits a good deed - We will increase for him good therein. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Appreciative.
